records.ety: [L., fr. Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ belonging to commerce, fr. <?/ traveler, trader; <?/ in + <?/ way through and over, path. See In, and Empiric, Fare.]

defs: A place of trade; a market place; a mart; esp., a city or town with extensive commerce; the commercial center of a country.
quotes: That wonderful emporium [Manchester] . . . was then a mean and ill-built market town.
It is pride . . . which fills our streets, our emporiums, our theathers.
